response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
For any requested field absent from a tool result, write "unknown" instead of inferring a value.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve the two independent names in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the unique stage-1 matches together before checking the mutation condition.
Update Spring festival runbook only after stage 2 verifies its unique ID and blocked status.

arguments.body: Spring festival runbook was updated to ready after status verification.
arguments.subject: Record update: Spring festival runbook

stages.purpose: Notify the named operational recipient only after stage 3 returns a successful mutation.

state_assertions: Record pro-690 changes from blocked to ready.
Record pro-290 and distractor pro-1090 remain unchanged.
Exactly one notification is sent to project coordinator, and only after the mutation succeeds.

prompt: Resolve Winter shelter checklist in Beacon Program and Spring festival runbook in Clover Program with parallel searches, then retrieve both unique matches together. If Spring festival runbook is still blocked, change only Spring festival runbook from blocked to ready. Leave Winter shelter checklist unchanged. Only after that mutation succeeds, notify project coordinator with the outcome; do not send a notice if the mutation is skipped or fails. Report only returned fields, and label any missing requested detail as unknown. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.

stage_4.body: Spring festival runbook was updated to ready after status verification.
